sourceMovie.title: Bloodshot
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Bloodshot works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Bloodshot clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Bloodshot?
faq.answer: Try Avengers: Infinity War, Guardians of the Galaxy, Black Panther—each shares DNA with Bloodshot while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Bloodshot?
faq.answer: Bloodshot (2020) is best described as Action, Science Fiction, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Bloodshot worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
